exclusion_rule: Exclude studies containing non-human samples only
review_condition: Review if human and non-human samples are mixed
notes: Main workflow focuses on human samples

exclusion_rule: Exclude studies that do not include gut, stool, fecal, faecal, intestinal, or gastrointestinal samples
review_condition: Review if body site is unclear
notes: Non-gut microbiome studies are outside this case-study scope

exclusion_rule: Exclude disease-only cohorts without healthy, control, or baseline samples
review_condition: Review if healthy/control subgroup may be present
notes: Relevant disease studies may be useful later but are not the main target

exclusion_rule: Exclude studies without relevant microbiome sequencing data
review_condition: Review if data type is unclear
notes: Processed-only data may not support CDI-DAS raw-data acquisition

exclusion_rule: Exclude studies with no usable public BioProject, SRA, ENA, or equivalent accession
review_condition: Review if accession may be in supplementary material
notes: Accession clarity is required for reproducible acquisition

exclusion_rule: Exclude studies where sequence files are not publicly downloadable
review_condition: Review if repository status is unclear
notes: Controlled-access-only data are outside the public CDI-DAS workflow

exclusion_rule: Exclude studies where sample context cannot be interpreted
review_condition: Review if supplementary metadata may resolve the issue
notes: Metadata must support biological and technical screening

exclusion_rule: Exclude studies where samples cannot be connected to run accessions
review_condition: Review if mapping may exist in supplementary files
notes: Sample-to-run mapping is important for reproducible manifests

exclusion_rule: Defer studies that are relevant but not needed for the primary case study
review_condition: Review later if expansion is needed
notes: Useful for secondary or future discovery workflows
